name: TidyCal Booking & Calendar API
what_it_does: Simple appointment booking and calendar scheduling platform with REST API — offering one-time purchase pricing as a lifetime deal alternative to Calendly, with Google Calendar sync, embeddable widgets, and group booking support.
use_cases: Creating and querying appointment bookings via REST API for CRM integration
Retrieving available time slots for automated booking agents
Managing booking types and calendar availability programmatically
Building custom booking workflows that create TidyCal appointments
Syncing appointment data with external tools via webhook notifications
not_for: Complex round-robin team scheduling (use Cal.com or Calendly Teams)
Service business booking with payment and staff management (use Acuity or SimplyBook)
best_when: An individual consultant or small team needs simple calendar booking with a one-time cost, basic API access, and no monthly subscription.
avoid_when: You need enterprise team scheduling, complex workflows, or guaranteed long-term vendor support.

auth.notes: API key from TidyCal account settings. Bearer token authentication. Account-scoped access. Webhook support for new bookings. Limited API surface — primarily for reading booking data.

pricing.paid_tiers: One-time: $29 lifetime deal (sold via AppSumo); Monthly: $8/month
pricing.notes: Famous for lifetime deal on AppSumo. Very affordable. Good for solopreneurs and consultants. Bootstrapped product. API less mature than Calendly but functional for basic automation.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Limited API surface — primarily booking queries and webhook delivery. API documentation minimal compared to enterprise scheduling tools. Good for simple read-and-react automation patterns.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Booking read operations are idempotent. Webhook events may retry — implement deduplication by booking ID. New booking notifications are one-time events.
known_agent_gotchas: Very limited API surface — many features UI-only
Bootstrapped product — API roadmap less predictable than VC-backed tools
Lifetime deal pricing means product sustainability depends on ongoing revenue
Google Calendar sync requires UI setup — cannot be configured via API

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. API key auth. GDPR compliant. US data residency. Small team — limited formal security certifications. Appropriate for low-risk personal scheduling data.
